	ajmp jump_1802

	ljmp jump_0901

	ajmp jump_1800

	nop
	nop
	nop
	dec R1
	mov 00h, @R0
	jc jump_1D3F
	rr A
	inc R1
	inc A
	orl A, R0
jump_1D3F:
	rr A
	orl A, R3
	nop
	xrl A, 00h
	mov R1, #00h	;   0
	jmp @A + DPTR

	nop
	jnz fwd_1D4A_jump_1B00
fwd_1D4A_jump_1B00:
	ajmp jump_1B00

	xrl A, R6
	nop
	add A, R4
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DB4
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DBB
	nop
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	mov @R0, #00h	;   0
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	jmp @A + DPTR

	nop
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	xrl A, R7
	nop
	xrl A, R6
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DD8
	nop
	xrl A, @R0
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DB8
	nop
	xrl A, R6
	nop
	xrl A, R6
	nop
	xrl A, R7
	nop
	anl 00h, #79h	; 121 'y'
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	dec R1
	xch A, @R0
	nop
	jc jump_1DF6
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DD0
	nop
	xrl A, R6
	nop
	xrl 00h, #2Eh	;  46 '.'
	nop
	addc A, @R0
	rr A
	orl A, R3
	nop
	xrl A, 00h
	mov R1, #00h	;   0
	jmp @A + DPTR

	nop
	jnz fwd_1D9A_jump_1B00
fwd_1D9A_jump_1B00:
	ajmp jump_1B00

	xrl A, R6
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DF6
	nop
	anl 00h, #42h	;  66 'B'
	nop
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DFC
	nop
	xrl A, 00h
	orl C, 20h.0
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	ajmp jump_1B00

	xrl A, R4
	nop
jump_1DB4:
	jb 20h.0, jump_1DF8
	nop
jump_1DB8:
	xrl A, #00h	;   0
	ajmp jump_1B00

; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	1DBBh
jump_1DBB:
	nop

org	1DBCh
	jnz jump_1DBE
jump_1DBE:
	mov A, #00h	;   0
	xrl A, 00h
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	dec R2
